confirmation_message: Kale Yeah! Thanks for applying to Instacart, we've got it from here! Our team is reviewing your application and will be in touch. Grab a snack and celebrate, you earned it.

form_answers.veteran_status: I am not a Protected Veteran
form_answers.disability_status: No, I don't have a disability, or a history/record of having a disability

notes: Different role from Jamie's 5/31 Instacart Associate HRBP application (dedup OK). JD min-qual asks 5+ yrs (Jamie ~3) and SF Bay Area location — YOE-stretch + relocation, both pushed forward per doctrine (not a hard stop; no explicit no-sponsorship language). Header location set to San Francisco, CA (Open to Relocation) to signal in-area; current state answered truthfully as Oregon on the form. No CAPTCHA appeared on submit.
